name: AREthCreateProvidedServiceInstance
title: AREthCreateProvidedServiceInstance
syntax: dword AREthCreateProvidedServiceInstance( dword aepHandle, dword serviceId, dword instanceId );
description: This function creates a Provided Service Instance and adds it to an Application Endpoint which was created by AREthReleaseProvidedServiceInstance.
Objects can be assigned to the Service Instance as follows:
The Service Instance can be deleted again with AREthReleaseProvidedServiceInstance.

parameters.name: aepHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the Application Endpoint (see AREthOpenLocalApplicationEndpoint)

return: 0: An error occurred. The error can be evaluated using the AREthGetLastError function.
